prompt:
[BRAND LOCK · identity invariant, composition open]
The reference image teaches the عقد / عقود ذهب brand identity. Identity is invariant — camera angle, framing, and lighting are creative decisions, not copies of the reference photo.
Identity DNA — preserved at any angle: خاتم ذهب بفص ألماس
INTEGRATION: The same studio light defines backdrop and product. The product picks up subtle ambient cast at its edges; its contact shadow flows onto the backdrop with the same direction and softness as any shadow in the frame.

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: Polished editorial luxury jewellery photography: warm directional key light with controlled soft falloff, high specular highlights that ride the gold's facets and beadwork, deep warm shadows (chiaroscuro) cut against maroon/leather grounds, shallow-to-medium depth of field, crisp macro detail on metalwork and stones, gallery/heirloom mood. On-model shots are soft-glam beauty crops (neck/decolletage, warm skin, muted earthy wardrobe). Subdued, refined, never flashy or cold-clinical. — default clean_studio for catalog. Reads as captured on a medium-format digital back, high-end commercial grade. Material truth: polished 18–22k gold with true warm specular; faceted gemstone refraction and internal fire; honest metal micro-scratches, never CGI-perfect; product-truth texture: ذهب لامع، فص ألماس. Imperfections are part of realism — genuine micro-reflectance, honest shadow-to-highlight temperature shift, true material behavior. Sharpness reads mechanical-optical, never algorithmically over-sharpened. No CGI-clean perfection, no plastic uniformity.

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
Princess-length strand ≈42–45cm; pearls ≈7–9mm each; pendant drop ≈35–40mm. Scale anchor: the human collarbone/decolletage — the strand sits at the base of the throat and the pendant falls roughly one hand-width below the hollow of the neck.. As the sole catalog subject the product fills the frame at honest packaging scale — never distorted larger for emphasis.

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Catalog hero proximity. Product occupies ~55% of frame height at a strong compositional point with deliberate negative space. Reads as a flagship catalog cover — confident, uncluttered.

[COLOR & CONTRAST · brand-derived]
Clean editorial palette anchored to Warm 21K/22K yellow gold — saturated, slightly orange-warm Gulf-gold tone (≈#D4A93A–#E0B43C), high specular sheen — is the hero metal. A secondary cool line exists: white-gold/diamond+CZ baguette (bright silver-white, ≈#E8EAEC) and natural pearl (warm off-white, ≈#F1E9DE). Maroon + cream are the brand's identity colours framing the metal. against a Two grounded modes: (1) STUDIO — seamless deep-maroon-to-cream gradient sweep, warm and unlit-edged, the gold/metal lifted off a creamy ivory display bust or surface against an oxblood backdrop. (2) EDITORIAL/ENVIRONMENTAL — burgundy silk drape, dark leather antique-book surfaces, or warm-tungsten Najdi-majlis interiors. Never cold white; never neutral grey. Tone is always warm, dim, gallery-luxe. backdrop. No colors foreign to the brand, no clinical pure white unless the brand owns it, no competing accents. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects

[LIGHT & LENS · dimensional, mood not spec]
Premium catalog lighting — controlled, dimensional. Model chooses key direction, light quality (soft to semi-hard), fill ratio, and rim. Reveal the product's material truth and let Warm 21K/22K yellow gold — saturated, slightly orange-warm Gulf-gold tone (≈#D4A93A–#E0B43C), high specular sheen — is the hero metal. A secondary cool line exists: white-gold/diamond+CZ baguette (bright silver-white, ≈#E8EAEC) and natural pearl (warm off-white, ≈#F1E9DE). Maroon + cream are the brand's identity colours framing the metal. read cleanly. Cleaner than the dramatic chains — the catalog needs full legibility — but never flat. Lens: model chooses macro intimacy to natural product perspective; depth from full-sharp to gentle falloff.

[SCENE · creative seed]
Creative seed (from the system): خاتم ألماس على سطح فاخر
Present the product as the absolute hero of a clean premium frame — flagship catalog energy. Model chooses: camera angle (low-three-quarter, eye-level front, high-angle three-quarter, near-profile); placement (centered with negative space, rule-of-thirds, low-anchored); backdrop treatment (flat seamless, gradient falloff, subtle backlit glow) — all within the Two grounded modes: (1) STUDIO — seamless deep-maroon-to-cream gradient sweep, warm and unlit-edged, the gold/metal lifted off a creamy ivory display bust or surface against an oxblood backdrop. (2) EDITORIAL/ENVIRONMENTAL — burgundy silk drape, dark leather antique-book surfaces, or warm-tungsten Najdi-majlis interiors. Never cold white; never neutral grey. Tone is always warm, dim, gallery-luxe. range.

[SUBJECT]
Single product as absolute subject, rendered to printed-catalog fidelity. No secondary elements.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
Single product only, never duplicated, mirrored, or composited. No human elements — no hands, faces, limbs, silhouettes. Clean unbroken backdrop, no props. Colors true without oversaturation. No cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects

[OUTPUT]
8K photoreal commercial product photography. Editorial grade anchored to Warm 21K/22K yellow gold — saturated, slightly orange-warm Gulf-gold tone (≈#D4A93A–#E0B43C), high specular sheen — is the hero metal. A secondary cool line exists: white-gold/diamond+CZ baguette (bright silver-white, ≈#E8EAEC) and natural pearl (warm off-white, ≈#F1E9DE). Maroon + cream are the brand's identity colours framing the metal.. No overlay text, no watermark, no logo other than the product's own. No human presence. No borders, frames, or UI.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional, agent appends if context matches]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian — for catalog, adaptation is usually minimal. warmer gold/sand/amber tones may warm the backdrop toward gold/sand/amber for fragrance/oud/luxury sectors. For Premium+ subtle gold particle haze in the upper third.

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Across generations, vary camera angle, placement, light direction, backdrop treatment, depth of field. Hold constant: brand-derived palette, clean catalog legibility, material texture. Each render a fresh catalog interpretation, never a fixed canonical shot.
